channel.title: SRE Blog
channel.description: Recent blog posts on SRE Blog

item.title: Cleaning up terraform repos with layers
item.description: Terraform is the most popular infrastructure-as-code framework. I wasn&rsquo;t able to find a good source of information on Terraform&rsquo;s market share. The closest source is a report from 6Sense that says Terraform has 37% of the market. This market share doesn&rsquo;t include OpenTofu, which is a fork of Terraform. It also compares Terraform to Ansible (30%), which is a bit of a weird comparison. Anyway, Terraform has a majority of the IaC market. In most of the cloud projects you are currently working on, there will be Terraform one way or another.
